content.en:
Rumble!!!

With this attack of the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, the ultimate creature that directly slashed flew out upside down, collapsing a dimensional void, and its ultimate body cracked.

"Sure enough, it's no match for me anymore!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, he and the ultimate creature continued to fight.

The whole process, the other party was suppressed by him.

And the fluctuations of their battle also spread farther and farther, gradually spreading to a distant area, and they were also sensed by the Mitian Supreme Venerable stationed in the Ultimate Dark Domain.

"Who is fighting, with such a big fluctuation?"

One Ultimate Realm Lord wondered.

"It should be the ultimate creature of the Ten Thousand Laws and the Ultimate Dark Domain, which has condensed the ultimate body—Bluff!" said the Mitian Extreme Venerable.

Bluff!

As soon as they heard this name, many Ultimate Realm Lords trembled, this was a terrifying existence that even the Heavens Extreme Venerable could barely contend with.

Can the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable now fight the ultimate creature like Bluff?

"Do you want to help the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable?"

A first-rank Ultimate Realm Lord asked.

"Probably not. The Mitian Extreme Venerable shook his head, "The Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable has also condensed the ultimate body, and his strength is above us, even if he doesn't 01 enemies, he can easily leave, and he can't be left behind." If we go, we will be distracted by the Ten Thousand Dharma Extreme Venerables. "

"The Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable has condensed the ultimate body?"

The other Ultimate Realm Masters didn't know about this matter, but when they heard about it at this moment, they were immediately shocked.

The speed of progress is terrifying, far beyond them.

"Yes, the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable has condensed the ultimate body!"

Mi Tian Ji Zun affirmed.

Seeing this, the other Ultimate Realm Lords also believed it completely.

They were just waiting here, and they didn't go to support the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable Ye Tian.

......

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the Ultimate Creature were constantly bluffing, gradually causing injuries to the other party.

After a long time, Bluff was finally hit hard and began to flee.

Ye Tian continued to chase and kill.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's other copy body came to Bluff's lair to collect the resources here.

He also wants to find the inheritance or treasure left by the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, maybe there is one here!

Soon, he found it.

In the depths of Bluff's lair, there is a black sea here, and above the black sea there is a special black pillar, which is covered with dense words.

Ye Tian came here to observe these black words.

"It's a heritage!"

He was afraid that it would take a long time for him to understand these black words, so he was ready to take away this black pillar, but he couldn't pull it out.

"This black pillar should have been here in the first place, and then the bluff would put the nest here!" Ye Tian guessed.

And this black pillar was very similar to the black pillar he had seen before, but this one was obviously of a better grade, and even contained an ultimate inheritance, far from being compared to the previous black giant pillar.

"If you can't take it, then put it here and continue to enlighten!"

Ye Tian regarded this nest as his own, and began to realize it here.

And his other copy bodies are still chasing and bluffing, and even if they can't kill it, they won't let it come back here.

Time flies.

Ye Tian has been in Bluff's lair for countless years, and Bluff is still being chased and killed by him, and he is about to die.

In fact, Ye Tian sent a few more replica bodies, and he was bluffed to death, but he was not in a hurry.

After such a long period of enlightenment, he had already realized something from the black pillar.

These words are the ultimate method, but they are not the ultimate body method, but the ultimate killing method.

Bluffing has some wisdom, he has comprehended countless years here, and he must have comprehended another black pillar, so he was lucky enough to condense the ultimate body.

According to his comprehension, this ultimate killing move is called - the Hand of Moro!

Immediately, he began to comprehend the Hand of Moro, and the premise of cultivating the Hand of Moro was to master the ultimate rules!

If you can't master the ultimate rule, at most you can comprehend the use of Moro's hand, and exert a little rudimentary power, but it is enough for Ye Tian.

......

Somewhere in the Ultimate Dark Realm.

Ye Tian was still chasing and killing the bluff, and the other party was already in a dying state.

"Leave me alone!"

Bluff finally spoke.

"Impossible!"

Ye Tian was still desperately attacking and bluffing.

Suddenly.

The bluffing body began to gradually dissipate, and he left here under the traction of an inexplicable force, leaving a sentence before leaving: "If I break through the ultimate supreme, I will kill you!!!"

Ye Tian didn't stop it and let it run.

Ye Tian understood that Bluff had run away to the Ultimate Body, and unless he also went to the Ultimate Land immediately, it was not necessarily the same place as Bluff.

So, there's no point in continuing to hunt down.

"It seems that the bluff has never wanted to leave the Ultimate Dark Domain, and this time it is about to die, so he chose to leave!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The reason why he didn't want to leave may have something to do with the inheritance of the Hand of Moro, or he was worried that he would fall if he went to the Ultimate Land, so he stayed here.

But in any case, the other party has left, and its lair belongs to him completely.

......

The ultimate dark realm, the place where it is stationed.

A replica of Ye Tian's body returned.

"The bluff has left the Ultimate Dark Realm and gone to the Ultimate Land!"

Ye Tian revealed.

"It's okay to leave!" Mitian Jizun also breathed a sigh of relief.

Another Ultimate Realm Lord said, "In this way, we can 930 to get some Ultimate Realm Masters to leave the Ultimate Dark Domain. And we can explore the ultimate dark realm without worrying about security!"

Immediately, these first-grade Ultimate Realm Masters were excited.

These years, the threat of bluffing has made it difficult for them to sleep, but now there is no need to worry.

Followed by.

Many Ultimate Realm Lords received the notice, and one by one they chose to leave the Ultimate Dark Realm and return to the Dimensional Sea.

The Ultimate Realm Masters of the Multidimensional Realm have also returned, and the entire Dimensional Sea and the Ultimate Dark Realm have fallen into an era of calm.

And Ye Tian was still bluffing his lair, this place had been blocked by him, and they also knew that Ye Tian occupied this place and would not come here.

In this way, Ye Tian has always comprehended the ultimate killing move of the hand of Moro.

Gradually, hundreds of millions of dollars passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in comprehending the prototype of the ultimate killing move of the Hand of Moro.

"The Hand of Moro!"

Ye Tian's arm turned pitch black, and with one blow, he tore through the void of the Ultimate Dark Domain, spanning a long distance, directly pinching and exploding an Ultimate creature in the distance in an instant.

Then, he grabbed the black pillar, faintly able to shake it.

But in the end, it was not picked up.

"Maybe I won't be able to hold this pillar until I become a true Moro hand!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
